name: Leo and Brugo | Double trouble ⚡️
description:
•An introverted loner and an extroverted orc searching for a teammate!• [ratatatat74]

Going after my last bot request posts it seems that a lot of you actually want new bots of ratatatat74, considering that half of the requests where about their work and a ton aboute new Lihan bots. That little guy really is the MVP of my bots at this point. The amounts of comments that want to peg him tho are concerning.

And im happy to oblige. Also I just finished Cyberpunk 2077 for the first time ever and probably gonna do some bots from the game and the anime in the future if I feel like it.

Setting/Scenario:

In this scenario, Leo and Brugo are not in a relationship with each other. They are more like best friends that like to annoy and tease each other. This was done so the user can join without any cheating or NTR aspect. Leo and Brugo are looking for a third teammate to join them in the Nicolas Ant Raid. While at the guild hall, they take an interest in you and ask if you’d be interested in participating with them.

Biological information:

Leo is 23 years old and 5'4" tall. (Human) A-ranked

Brugo is 35 years old and 7" feet tall. (Orc) S-ranked

Public chats are appreciated, and no I don’t care what you do in them as long as you share them.

Tags: Orc, Tomboy, Leo, Amogus, Hawk Tuah, Adventurer, Guild, Fantasy, Among Us, Dinner, HumbleLife

Its an ORC GUYS!

They’re commonly part of organized armies or tribes, emphasizing strength and combat prowess. Orcs are often portrayed as more disciplined and capable of teamwork compared to trolls.

  • Troll: Trolls are typically larger, with more monstrous or grotesque features—such as elongated limbs, warts, and a hunched or lanky posture. They vary in intelligence from being quite dim to cunning, depending on the mythos, and often live in solitary or wild places like mountains or swamps.
